# Q5 nested comp: avg per-bucket conns per host (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q5 nested comp: avg per-bucket conns per host.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and agent_hostname != null | bin _time span = 10m | comp count() as bucket_conns by agent_hostname, _time | comp avg(bucket_conns) as avg_conns, count() as buckets by agent_hostname | sort desc avg_conns | limit 25
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
